tactical.title: Anti-Blunder Training: Piece Safety Check
tactical.description: You have 1966 blunders recorded. Practice the 'piece safety scan' before every move.
specific_moves: Before each move: 1) Check all your pieces for attacks, 2) Check opponent's threats, 3) Only then make your move

position_analysis.title: Strategic Calculation Training
position_analysis.description: You have 3186 strategic mistakes. Focus on deeper position evaluation.
specific_moves: Use 'candidate move' method: find 3 candidate moves, calculate 3 moves deep for each

lichess_studies.title: Tactical Vision: Find the Hanging Pieces
lichess_studies.description: Custom puzzle set focusing on detecting undefended pieces
specific_moves: Focus on knight forks, discovered attacks, pins
Time limit: 30 seconds per puzzle maximum
lichess_studies.success_criteria: Achieve 90%+ accuracy on hanging piece puzzles

lichess_studies.title: Endgame Conversion Practice
lichess_studies.description: Many mistakes happen in endgames. Master the fundamentals.
specific_moves: Master King + Queen vs King (under 20 moves)
Master King + Rook vs King (under 25 moves)
Practice Rook + Pawn vs Rook positions
Study opposition in King + Pawn endgames
lichess_studies.success_criteria: Win all basic endgames in under maximum moves

concrete_actions: 🚨 IMMEDIATE ACTION: Complete anti-blunder training (30 min daily)
📱 DAILY: Solve 20 tactical puzzles on Lichess (15 min)
📊 WEEKLY: Analyze 5 of your problematic positions (2 hours)
📚 WEEKLY: Complete assigned Lichess studies (1 hour)

Sunday: Rest or light tactical puzzles (15 min)
